Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough. Plus, Emeril shares his recipes for the ultimate mushroom and Manchego pizza and classic pizza margherita
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients: Portuguese-style grilled sardines, salmon with quinoa with roasted shallot and cherry vinaigrette, and mackerel with spinach and chickpea salad
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner: sauteed chicken cutlets with Dijon-tarragon sauce, braised carrots, and pommes Lyonnaise
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Napoleon of Rutabaga Chips with Sauteed Shrimp; Potato Rosti with Duck Confit; Celery Root Bisque with Lobster; Salsify Saute with Crispy Black Bass
Video.title: Spring is in the Air

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril heads to Arizona to prepare a menu for Cardinals superfans.
Video.title: Emeril Tailgates Phoenix

Video.summary: Emeril shows the can't-lose tailgates recipes he serves to his family and friends.
Video.title: How Emeril Tailgates

Video.summary: Savory Croissant Breakfast Pudding; Nana's Noodle Pudding; Kicked-Up Chocolate Tapioca; Corn and Orange-Mango Pudding
Video.title: Sweet and Savory Puddings

Video.summary: Emeril serves up tasty Easter treats with an international twist: Baklava; Frozen Strawberry Lemon-Basil Mousse; Italian Easter Pie; Russian Tea Cakes
Video.title: Irresistible Sweets

Video.summary: It's over-the-top bold flavors with recipes including: Olive-Stuffed Leg of Lamb; Roasted Garlic and Onion Soup; Anchovy Bread; Roasted Figs with Gorgonzola
Video.title: Big Foods Bold Flavors

Video.summary: Passion Fruit Margarita; Florida Grouper with Tomatillo Sauce; Florida Orange-Mango Salsa; Lump Crab Meat Guacamole with Fried Yucca Chips
Video.title: Kicked-Up Dinner Party

Video.summary: Saganaki; Eggplant Slippers; Greek-Style Grilled Fish; Meatballs with Lemon Sauce; Diples Pastry
Video.title: Greek Cuisine

Video.summary: Come on, y'all, join Emeril for lightened Southern fare, starting with oven-fried catfish served with sweet succotash, "kicked-up" collard greens, and garlicky cornbread
Video.title: Lightened Southern Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril's brunch will feed a bunch! Cheesy country ham omelet, followed by warm popovers with creamy Creole shrimp, Prosecco and orange sorbet with Cointreau cocktail
Video.title: Come on Over for Brunch

Video.summary: Learn all of Emeril's tricks of the trade: chicken-fried steaks and oysters with creamy gravy, quick and easy broccoli and cheese soup, and homemade gnocchi with marinara sauce
Video.title: Chef's Tricks of the Trade

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: One-Pot Fish Stock, Bouillabaisse with Rouille
Video.title: Bouillabaisse

Video.summary: Roasted Stuffed Red Fish, Fried Flounder with Tartar Sauce, Herbed Grilled Trout with Portobello Mushrooms
Video.title: Whole Gulf Fish

Video.summary: Crawfish Bread, Baptist Church Fried Chicken Wings, Pralines
Video.title: Jazz Fest

Video.summary: Sweet Pea Soup, Horseradish Crusted Rib Roast, Cheesy Scalloped Potatoes
Video.title: Easter

Video.summary: Nola Style Cedar Plank Trout, Horseradish Potatoes
Video.title: Horseradish

Video.summary: Artichoke Preparation, Redfish Marcelle with Artichoke and Mushroom Sauce, Artichoke and Shrimp Salad
Video.title: Artichokes

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Cali-style carne asada burritos, and crowd-pleasing chicken and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: For a Cincinnati style tailgate, Emeril's Ohio favorites will make you the MVP of any party.
Video.title: Cincinnati Bengals

Video.summary: This week Emeril's throwing a Saints party at restaurant Meril with superfan Whistle Monsta.
Video.title: How New Orleans Tailgates
